title: Server Blacklist
description: Blocks Minecraft servers that are potentially unwanted, malicious, or pay-to-win. Uses https://github.com/OxideMC/malicious-server-blacklist
body:
# Server Blacklist

Blocks Minecraft servers that are potentially unwanted, malicious, or pay-to-win. Uses [`OxideMC/malicious-server-blacklist`](https://github.com/OxideMC/malicious-server-blacklist).
